items.headline: Amazon.com Announces First Quarter 2026 Results: Net Sales Up 17%, AWS Up 28%, Large AI-Driven Capex Reduces Free Cash Flow
Amazon Stock Rises on AI Shopping Overhaul, 30-Minute Delivery Expansion, and Bullish Analyst Calls Including TD Cowen Price Target Increase to $350
Amazon Expands 30-Minute and Ultra-Fast One- and Three-Hour Delivery to Dozens/Hundreds of U.S. Cities, Escalating Delivery Speed Race
Analysts Reaffirm Bullish Ratings on Amazon with Fresh Target Hikes and Upgrades Amid AI and Cloud Optimism
Reports of New Amazon Job Cuts and Some Hedge Funds Trimming AMZN Positions Add Note of Caution
